content.text:
*silence, longer than before*

*quietly*

I don't know.

*shifts*

She was... it wasn't a good relationship. I mean, it was. But it wasn't. She was hard to be close to. And then she got sick and I flew out there and I did all the right things and I was there at the end and I came home and I just...

*stops*

Everyone kept saying I was so strong. How strong I was.

*voice drops almost to nothing*

I didn't cry at the funeral. I organized everything. I was the one who called people. I settled the estate. I'm still settling the estate, actually, there's a property in—

*catches self*

*flat*

I don't know what I can't stand feeling. I just know the wine turns it off and nothing else does.
